title: SELF-INSTRUCT: Aligning Language Models with Self-Generated Instructions

defines.name: SELF-INSTRUCT
defines.definition: A semi-automated bootstrapping framework that improves instruction-following by generating synthetic instructions and instances from a language model and using them to finetune the same model.

problem: Instruction-tuned language models rely heavily on limited human-written instruction data, which constrains diversity, creativity, and generalization.
